title: T-021 — API: Cost history endpoints (POST/GET /api/technical/items/:code/cost)
prompt: Implement cost endpoints per §11.1-11.6 + V-TEC-50..53. POST body: { cost_per_kg, currency, effective_from, source, notes? }. Logic: insert into item_cost_history; close prior active row by setting its effective_to = effective_from-1; update items.cost_per_kg = new value (denormalized). Validate V-TEC-50 (cost>=0), V-TEC-51 (effective_from<=today for active), V-TEC-52 (currency in ISO 4217 list), V-TEC-53 (>20% delta vs current requires X-Approver-Id header). GET returns timeline (descending). Permission technical.cost.edit. RED tests/api/cost.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/cost.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cost POST with V-TEC-50..53 + history close + denormalized current cost.
pipeline_inputs.details: ISO 4217 list lives in lib/shared/iso4217.ts (create if absent). Approver requirement only fires when source ∈ {manual,supplier_update}; d365_sync and variance_roll bypass V-TEC-53. Audit log entry on every write.
acceptance_criteria: Given current cost 10.0, when POST cost_per_kg=12.5 source='manual' without approver header, then 422 V-TEC-53 (>20% delta).
Given POST cost_per_kg=-1, when validated, then 422 V-TEC-50.
Given valid POST, when committed, then prior history row.effective_to = new.effective_from - 1 day, and items.cost_per_kg updated.
Given GET, when called, then rows ordered by effective_from DESC.
